ValidationRule.description: A validation rule that checks (at case closing) that if either of the Risk of Death or Injury fields and Erroneous Results Reported is ‘Yes’ then the value of the ‘Type of Case’ needs to be ‘Complaint - SAP’
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,ISPICKVAL(Status,'Closed') ,OR(ISPICKVAL(DX_Risk_of_Death_or_Injury__c,'') ,ISPICKVAL(DX_Erroneous_Results_Reported__c ,'')) ,OR(RecordType.DeveloperName ='Dx_Software_Services' ,RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GjKo')) /* Dx Software Services EMEA L2 */
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_009: Risk of Death or Injury and Erroneous Results shouldn't be empty.
